---
title: &TITLE Pavel Salazar-Fernandez
last: Salazar
first: Pavel
people_group: gradstudent
email: "epsalazarf@gmail.com"
education:
  - Ph.D. student Biomedical Sciences program | UNAM
subtitle: PhD student
description: ""
bio: "I am a PhD student in the Biomedical Sciences program, under the supervision of Dr. Federico Sánchez Quinto, studying how the evolutionary history of Latin American populations shapes present-day patterns of genetic disease risk. My work uses genomic data from both ancient and contemporary samples to examine how ancestry, demography, and natural selection interact in medically relevant ways.

I have a background in biotechnology and integrative biology, and a specialization in bioinformatics. I work primarily with whole-genome data in the contexts of population genomics, paleogenomics, and genetic ancestry inference. My research integrates these perspectives into a single framework for understanding how historical admixture and past selective pressures continue to influence health in the Mexican population.

My current project examines how alleles that once provided protection against ancient pathogens now contribute to susceptibility to autoimmune diseases. Through this case, I explore how evolutionary trade-offs become visible in modern clinical genetics."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:epsalazarf@gmail.com
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
